title: Careers
subtitle: Join our mission to transform operational chaos into measurable performance.
introCopy: We are building a consulting-and-execution firm focused on operational excellence for growing businesses. We look for people who are structured, responsive, practical, and comfortable taking ownership.

benefit1.title: Impact
benefit1.description: See measurable results from your work with real clients.

benefit2.title: Growth
benefit2.description: Continuous learning opportunities and career development.

benefit3.title: Flexibility
benefit3.description: Remote-first culture with flexible working arrangements.

applicationNote: Share your profile, role interest, and a short note on why you fit the role. We value clarity, ownership, and execution mindset over polished jargon.

job1.title: Business Development Manager
job1.description: Own outbound pipeline, discovery scheduling, follow-ups, and opportunity conversion.

job2.title: Senior Operations Manager
job2.description: Lead client execution, review rhythms, process documentation, and delivery control.

job3.title: Platform Developer
job3.description: Build and maintain the WFM Governance App, dashboards, and internal workflow tools.

job4.title: Business Analyst
job4.description: Support diagnostics, reporting, research, and implementation documentation.

noMatchDescription: We're always interested in connecting with talented individuals. Send us your resume and we'll keep you in mind for future opportunities.
